title: Packed array itterators treated as reg/wire

features.name: for_loop_int_iterator_as_array_index
features.description: Code should include a for loop with an int iterator variable used directly as an index into a multi-dimensional unpacked array

features.name: nested_for_loops_variable_indexing
features.description: Code should include nested for loops with int iterators used as variable indices in packed array slice selections
